'''Darkon III''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="BF">{{JournalCite|1|Breaking Free: The Adventures of Dannen Lifehold}}</ref> of the [[Darkon system/Legends|Darkon system]], within the [[Chaama sector/Legends|Chaama sector]], in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]<ref name="EAOC" /> and [[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]] regions of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="Region" /> In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], the corporate criminal [[Linkaas]] requested that his employee, the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Dannen Lifehold]], make a stop in Darkon III, before proceeding to his destination, the planet [[Dohu VII]]. This was in order for Linkaas to gain time to organize a trap on Dohu VII for the smuggler.<ref name="BF" />

==Behind the scenes==
Darkon III was first mentioned in the short story "[[Breaking Free: The Adventures of Dannen Lifehold]]," written by [[Dave Marron]] and published in [[February]] [[1994]] within the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 1|first issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''.<ref name="BF" /> The [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion]] placed the Darkon [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Darkon III, in grid square J-7.<ref name="EAOC" />
